title: Fast CUDA Kernels for Transformer Attention
summary: We present optimized CUDA kernels for multi-head attention that achieve 2x speedup over baseline implementations on H100 GPUs.

title: Quantization Techniques for Large Language Models
summary: This paper surveys quantization methods for LLMs, covering INT4 and FP8 formats with benchmarks on modern accelerators.

title: Old Paper Outside Cutoff
summary: This paper was published before the cutoff and should be filtered out.
